title: helia bifida
intro: Helia bifida, also known as Heliotropium or Turnsole, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and distinctive leaf shape. The medicinal properties of Helia bifida include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pain, and support the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Helia bifida is often used in herbal preparations, including tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing.
